questionHtml: The iodine number is the number of grams of iodine which reacts with 100 g of fat. Calculate the iodine number of oleic acid.
markschemeHtml:
«one C=C bond»
«1 mole iodine : 1 mole oleic acid»

«  100 × 253.80 282.46 =» 89.85 «g of I2» ✔

NOTE: Accept “90 «g of I2»”.

meta.title: The iodine number is the number of grams of iodine which reacts with 100 g of fat. Calculate the iodine number of oleic acid.
